title: I Want to Be Neenja! The Movie
original_title: I Want to Be Neenja! The Movie
overview: Follows the amazing GoGirl as she tries to defeat the evil Chow, a billionaire villain on a mission to end smiles. This hilarious, action packed comedy will have you laughing at every twist and turn along the way.
